name: Sales Data (CSV)
description: A CSV file kept in mesh content — the data source the Python pandas participant loads over the mesh. Edit it here and reload the Pandas Explorer to see the new data.

content.content:
# Sales Data

Monthly sales by region — **a file kept in content**. The `py/pandas` participant reads this node over the mesh, parses the CSV below with `pandas.read_csv`, and serves the resulting DataFrame back to the [Pandas Explorer](@/PythonDemo/PandasExplorer/LiveFrame) as a live DataGrid.

```csv
month,region,sales,units
Jan,EMEA,120.0,12
Feb,EMEA,135.5,14
Mar,EMEA,128.0,13
Apr,APAC,98.0,9
May,APAC,143.0,15
Jun,APAC,150.0,16
Jul,APAC,161.0,17
Aug,EMEA,152.0,15
```
